targets.boundary: Entire value chain (global operations, supply chain, and product lifecycle).
targets.notes: Apple describes this as the emissions-reduction component of its 2030 net-zero value-chain goal.
targets.title: 2030 75% absolute GHG reduction vs 2015 (full value chain)

targets.boundary: Entire value chain (global operations, supply chain, and product lifecycle).
targets.notes: This net-zero target builds on the 2030 reduction goal and addresses residual emissions to achieve net-zero climate impact by 2030.
targets.title: 2030 net-zero GHG emissions across value chain

targets.boundary: Global corporate operations (offices, retail stores, and data centers).
targets.notes: Apple states its global corporate operations have been carbon neutral since 2020.
targets.title: Carbon-neutral corporate operations from 2020
